SAVE THE DATE  for our April  
PTA General Meeting ! 
Wednesday, April 8th
7:00-8:00 PM ET via Zoom
Link to follow in next Wednesday Folder
and PTA emails
We look forward to seeing you there!
ELA Curriculum with
Beatrice Hanratty,
Elementary ELA Supervisor

T I M E

FRIDAY, APRIL 10TH
6:15-8:15 PM
WEST ORANGE HIGH SCHOOL CAFETERIAST. CLOUD PTA WELCOMES YOU TO
Join us and enjoy a night of interactive and fun science experiments! 
 All children MUST have a caregiver with them, 
as this event is meant to engage families 
together in fun STEM experiences. SCIENCE SCIENCE

DROPOFF & PICKUP
SAFEHelp make
for everyone
GIVE US YOUR SUGGESTIONS
If even thinking about SCHOOL DROP-OFF & PICK-UP increases your
stress levels, help us make a positive change!
The PTA is collecting IDEAS AND POTENTIAL SOLUTIONS to discuss
with the school on ways to improve the drop-off and pick-up
process, with the goal of creating a safer, smoother, and less
stressful experience for all families and staff.
EMAIL INFO@STCLOUDPTA.ORG WITH YOUR SUGGESTIONS
Feedback to be shared at the April PTA MeetingST. CLOUD PTA
